en: Something that makes me look at you too often Baby, you can give us something
ko: 너를 너무 자주 쳐다보게 만드는 무언가

en: Baby, I could run all the time Baby, I'm talking crazy
ko: 베이비, 나는 항상 달릴 수 있어

en: I need you running my space, friend I need it, baby, I'm late
But I still can't check in with you I know that I need my friend
But I wouldn't wanna leave you No, I wouldn't wanna bleed
But my heart, my mind, and my body Stayin', stayin'
ko: 하지만 내 마음, 내 정신 그리고 내 몸이

en: My, my, my, my, my, my, my, my body Stayin', stayin'
ko: 내 몸이 말하고 있어, 말하고 있어

en: My, my, my, my, my, my, my, my body stayin' I don't know what it is
I can't tell you what it is But you got me going crazy
